g.text: Materials: Water (1500), Tissue (1540), Skull (4080), Air (344), Standoff (1420) m/s
Methods: UniformWater | UniformTissue | Custom. Skin: skinseg.py
modules: List[TransformedTransducer]. to_transducer(): merge into flat array.
Types: CMD, RESP, TX7332, POWER, ACK/NAK | CRC16-CCITT | Async mode
Point (3D, units, transforms) | ArrayTransform | Spherical/Cartesian coords
Unit conversion | JSON encoding | DICOM-to-NIfTI | Standoff transforms
Skin mesh -> search grid -> SVD plane fit
All objects: to_dict() / from_dict() / to_json() / to_file() | PYFUSEncoder for numpy, datetime | netCDF for simulations
161+ tests across 25 files (pytest) | Serialization round-trips, DB CRUD, mock hardware, GPU sim | dataclasses_are_equal()
